query:
-- Yellow = old GBA Vocus services cancelled, replaced with ABB
-- BU278922 = 73 Elm St, Barcaldine QLD (Inactive)
-- BU278923 = 4 Church Ln, Emerald QLD (Inactive) 
-- BU291154 = 74 Victoria Parade, Rockhampton QLD (Inactive)
-- These are in vocus_nbn_services. Check if they exist as services too.

-- Find GBA services at these addresses
SELECT externalId, planName, supplierName, status, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, locationAddress, dataSource
FROM services 
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0101'  -- GBA Consulting Engineers
ORDER BY status, supplierName;
